name: Zee Entertainment Enterprises Limited
summary: Zee Entertainment Enterprises Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in broadcasting satellite television channels. The company broadcasts channels, including Hindi entertainment channels, such as Zee TV, Zee TV HD, &tv, &tv HD, BIG Magic, and Zee Anmol; Hindi movie channels comprising Zee Anmol Cinema, Zee Cinema, Zee Action, Zee Classic, &pictures, and Zee Bollywood, as well as Zee Cinema HD and &pictures HD; and regional entertainment channels, including Zee Marathi, Zee Yuva, Zee Bangla, Zee Tamil, Zee Telegu, Zee Kannada, Zee Sarthak, Zee Punjab, Zee Keralam, Big Ganga, Zee Talkies, Zee Bangla Cinema, Zee Cinemalu, Zee Biskope, Zee Thirai, Zee Picchar, Zee Marathi HD, Zee Talkies HD, Zee Telugu HD, and Zee Bangla HD. It also broadcasts niche channels comprising Zee Caf√É¬©, Zee Caf√É¬© HD, &priv√É¬© HD, Zing, &flix, &flix HD, and Zee ETC Bollywood; and ZEE5, India.com, TheHealthSite.com, Bollywoodlife.com, Cricket Country, and BGR.in digital entertainment platforms, as well as broadcasts 35 channels in the international markets. In addition, the company operates Zee Studios, a film production and distribution studio, as well as Zee Music Company, a music publishing label; operates as a space selling agent for other satellite television channels; and sells media content, which includes programs/film rights/feeds/music rights. Further, it operates Zee LIVE, a live event; and Zee Theatre, a theatre. The company has approximately 1.3 billion viewers in 173 countries worldwide. The company was formerly known as Zee Telefilms Limited and changed its name to Zee Entertainment Enterprises Limited in January 2007. Zee Entertainment Enterprises Limited was founded in 1982 and is based in Mumbai, India.
